title: 12 questions the men's committee must answer heading into Selection Sunday
content: The RedHawks and Tigers continue to be the talk of the bubble, plus more considerations for men's committee.

title: Duke shows mettle in holding off UVA for ACC title
content: No. 1 Duke defeated No. 10 Virginia on Saturday night for its second straight Atlantic Coast Conference tournament championship under coach Jon Scheyer and its third title in the past four years.

title: Venezuela KO's defending champ Japan from WBC
content: Wilyer Abreu hit a go-ahead, three-run shot in the sixth, and Venezuela rallied to stun defending champion Japan to advance to the World Baseball Classic semifinals.

title: Reaves, Luka deliver late-game magic in OT thriller
content: Austin Reaves executed a perfect missed free throw before sinking the game-tying bucket to force overtime, and Luka Doncic drained the winning jumper in the extra frame to lift the Lakers past the Nuggets on Saturday night.

title: Arizona gets revenge, tops UH to win Big 12 title
content: Arizona will head into the NCAA tournament with a nine-game winning streak after holding off Houston 79-74 in Saturday's Big 12 tournament final, avenging its loss to the Cougars in last season's conference title game.

title: St. John's routs UConn to defend Big East title
content: A tenacious defensive performance carried No. 13 St. John's to its second straight Big East tournament championship Saturday night with a 72-52 blowout of sixth-ranked UConn at Madison Square Garden.

title: Leafs want Gudas punished more for Matthews hit
content: The Maple Leafs believe the NHL didn't go far enough in punishing Ducks defenseman Radko Gudas for the hit that ended Auston Matthews' season.

title: Cubs' Suzuki (knee) exits Japan's WBC loss
content: Chicago Cubs outfielder Seiya Suzuki exited Japan's World Baseball Classic quarterfinal matchup against Venezuela because of right knee discomfort.

title: TTU to have star Anderson available for tourney
content: Texas Tech star guard Christian Anderson will be available for the NCAA tournament after leaving the Red Raiders' Big 12 tournament loss because of an apparent groin injury.

title: 🏈 Which NFL teams have improved most in FA?
content: We picked out the teams that took the biggest steps forward this week through their signings and other moves -- including the 49ers.

title: Has UCLA leapfrogged UConn for No. 1 overall and four more big questions for Selection Sunday
content: Where the top eight seeds play in the regionals is as big of a question as which bubble teams get in Selection Sunday.

title: Women's Bracketology: How the committee's top-16 reveal rippled through the field
content: Saturday, the committee revealed the top-16 teams that will host early round games. North Carolina moved in.

title: Live tracking NFL free agency: Updates on signings, trades, cuts
content: We're following NFL free agency signings, trades, cuts, contract restructures and other moves as they happen.

title: From Team Japan to MLB stars: Who could be next to make the jump?
content: The World Baseball Classic has given fans a chance to see Japan's best players before they hit the majors. Here's who to keep an eye on this year.

title: Arteta turned to the teenage Dowman, and it paid off tremendously for Arsenal
content: It was a night where Max Dowman made history for Arsenal, and may have helped them go in touching distance of the Premier League title.

title: WNBA CBA negotiations: New deal by Monday is goal as marathon meeting continues
content: The WNBA and union exchanged about 15 proposals between Tuesday and the early hours of Saturday morning.

title: NBA draft intel and latest buzz: Peterson or Dybantsa at No. 1? What's Boozer's case?
content: Here's what league insiders are saying about Darryn Peterson, AJ Dybantsa and more top NBA draft prospects.

title: 'I want to earn it': Tennessee track lands commit from Kevin Hart's son Hendrix
content: Hendrix Hart's personal bests include 10.68 seconds in the 100-meter dash and 21.35 in the 200-meter dash.

title: Men's coaching tracker: Who could be up next at Cincinnati?
content: The Bearcats are moving on from Wes Miller after five seasons -- but have promising candidates on deck.

title: Full 2026 draft order: When teams will pick across all 257 selections, seven rounds
content: The order for all seven rounds of the 2026 NFL draft is set, starting with the Raiders at No. 1 and ending with the Broncos at No. 257.

title: Verstappen: Every lap in Red Bull is survival mode
content: Max Verstappen said every lap is survival mode with his Red Bull at the moment as he cannot control the car, a situation that is "just really not how it should be."

title: Weekend predictions: Can Spurs stop record losing streak at Liverpool?
content: Another weekend of action awaits across the soccer calendar as Julien Laurens picks out the best games to watch in Europe. Will Spurs sink deeper into the relegation battle?

title: Transfer rumors, news: Man United eye move for USMNT's Adams
content: Manchester United are reported to be leading the way to sign Bournemouth and USMNT midfielder Tyler Adams. Transfer Talk has the latest.

title: Risers and fallers: Filipowski, da Silva moving up; Flagg a problem during playoffs?
content: Tristan da Silva is on the rise, and should fantasy basketball managers keep players like Bennedict Mathurin and Cameron Johnson?

title: Cheat sheet: Sleepers, busts, rookies and closers
content: You've read their names all preseason long, it'd be a shame to forget them on draft day. The ESPN Cheat Sheet is one way to make sure that doesn't happen.

title: Speeding SUV hits woman in Navi Mumbai, drags her 50m before crashing into 6 parked vehicles
content: A speeding SUV driven by a teenager, allegedly under the influence of alcohol, struck a woman and dragged her 50 meters before crashing into multiple vehicles. Prompt medical attention saved the woman's life, and police have registered an FIR against the driver and his chauffeur.

title: No captaincy for Virat Kohli, Watson snubbed in Dinesh Karthik's all-time RCB XI
content: Dinesh Karthik unveiled his all-time Royal Challengers Bengaluru XI, surprisingly naming Rajat Patidar as captain over Virat Kohli. Karthik lauded Patidar's leadership and impact, while also crediting Krunal Pandya's crucial role in their maiden IPL title win last season. RCB now prepares to defend their championship in IPL 2026 with a confident squad.

title: 'Slapped, threatened': Delivery boys assaulted amid rush for LPG cylinders in Pune
content: Cylinder delivery personnel in Pune faced aggression, with one slapped and another hit near the neck amidst a surge in cooking gas demand. Delivery boys were threatened and manhandled by customers demanding cylinders without bookings, leading to security concerns. Police are now coordinating with distributors to address these incidents.

title: Perplexity AI CEO agrees that Computer Science is gradually returning to its roots
content: AI is rapidly automating coding's routine tasks, pushing software engineering back towards its mathematical roots. Experts predict AI could soon handle most end-to-end coding, with some engineers already code-free. While LLMs still struggle with complex design, this shift is prompting a rethink in computer science education, emphasizing logic over syntax.

title: Trump’s forced labour probe: China faces closest scrutiny; what does it mean for India?
content: India's solar panel, electronics, and garment exports face heightened US scrutiny following a new trade probe into forced labor in global supply chains. The investigation, covering 60 economies including India, examines goods made with forced labor or using inputs from such sources. This could impact Indian exporters reliant on Chinese components, demanding stricter documentation and compliance.

title: EC to announce assembly polls schedule for five states today
content: The Election Commission is set to announce the schedule for assembly elections in West Bengal, Assam, Tamil Nadu, Kerala, and Puducherry today. The upcoming polls are expected to involve fewer phases, particularly in West Bengal, with a substantial increase in central forces deployment. Supplementary voter lists for West Bengal will also be published following the adjudication of 'doubtful' voter cases.

title: 100 stray dogs poisoned to death, buried near river in Telangana
content: Around 100 stray dogs were allegedly poisoned and killed in Kishtapur village, Mancherial district, on the alleged orders of the village sarpanch and gram panchayat secretary. A complaint filed on March 10 led to an FIR after intervention from the DGP. Animal activists are demanding exhumation and post-mortems for justice.

title: Accenture CEO Julie Sweet to company’s employees: If you want a promotion, you need to ...
content: Accenture CEO Julie Sweet has mandated that employees must demonstrate proficiency in using AI tools to be considered for promotions. This requirement reflects the consultancy's integration of AI into its core operations, a shift Sweet likens to the adoption of computers in the past. The company has invested significantly in reskilling its workforce to adapt to these evolving workplace technologies.

title: How Sheikh Sajjad Gul and Shabbir Lone rebuilt terror networks in Pak, B'desh
content: A 2002 Delhi Police operation arrested three Lashkar-e-Taiba operatives, leading to the neutralization of two commanders. Two of the arrested, Sajjad Gul and Shabbir Lone, later escaped India after serving their sentences. They have since resurfaced abroad, with Gul heading a LeT proxy and Lone allegedly running a terror network in Bangladesh.

title: Rohit Sharma on Mumbai vs rest debate: 'I don't believe in this edge'
content: Former India captain Rohit Sharma lauded the men's and women's cricket teams for their recent World Cup victories, expressing hope they will maintain this winning momentum. He emphasized hard work and the contributions of "people behind the scenes" for the teams' successes. Sharma also encouraged T20 Mumbai league players to seize opportunities and praised the MCA for reviving the league.

title: FBI is investigating malware-laden games on Steam: suspected games and attack timeline
content: The FBI is investigating malware embedded in games on Steam, with a focus on potential victims between May 2024 and January 2026. Several games, including BlockBlasters and Chemia, have been identified as containing the malicious software. The agency is urging anyone who may have installed these games or has relevant information to come forward.

title: On way to PM Modi’s rally, BJP workers target Bengal minister Shashi Panja’s Girish Park residence
content: State minister Shashi Panja sustained injuries when BJP supporters en route to PM Modi's rally allegedly attacked her Kolkata home. The incident saw clashes between Trinamool and BJP workers, with police also injured. Panja accused BJP of violence, while the party claimed their buses were stoned first. The Election Commission has sought a report.

title: Filmmaker Sanoj Mishra seeks probe into ‘Kumbh girl’ Monalisa Bhonsle’s age after marriage
content: Filmmaker Sanoj Mishra has demanded an investigation into the age of 'Kumbh girl' Monalisa Bhonsle following her recent marriage. Mishra alleges Monalisa was a minor during the Maha Kumbh and claims her age documents may have been altered. He plans to meet her family to demand a medical examination and threatens legal action if she is found to be underage.

title: 'Not ice and fire, we are fire and fire': Sanju Samson on partnership with Abhishek Sharma
content: Sanju Samson and Abhishek Sharma's explosive 98-run opening partnership powered India to a massive 255/5 in the T20 World Cup final. India secured a commanding 96-run victory, clinching their third T20 World Cup title and becoming the first host nation to defend the crown. Samson lauded their 'fire and fire' partnership, highlighting their natural understanding and bravery.

title: India’s second-home boom: Why it is a smart real estate investment option
content: India's second-home market is shifting towards strategic investments in popular leisure destinations like Goa and Alibaug by 2026. Wealthy individuals are prioritizing growth areas offering both lifestyle benefits and rental income potential. This trend is driven by improved infrastructure, a focus on wellness, and the rise of remote work, making these locations attractive for long-term appreciation and personal enjoyment.

title: Dehradun horror: 2 minors among 3 held for gang rape of 14-year-old girl
content: Police in Dehradun arrested a 19-year-old man and apprehended two 15-year-old boys for the alleged gang rape of a 14-year-old girl. The victim was lured to a forest, drugged with a sedative-laced cold drink, and assaulted throughout the night. The case came to light after the girl's mother filed a complaint.

title: 'UK has fallen to Islam': How a Sikh restaurant in London became a flashpoint for global right-wing
content: At the centre of the controversy is Rangrez, a restaurant on Fulham Palace Road that had already announced its closure after operating for 16 years. Its owner, Harman Singh Kapoor, says he faced months of harassment because the restaurant publicly refused to serve halal meat. Videos of confrontations outside the premises have since been seized upon by commentators across the world as evidence for a familiar claim in right-wing circles: that Britain has “fallen to Islam”.

title: FPV drones enter Iran vs US-Israel war: All about the low-cost ‘kamikaze’ weapons
content: The ongoing war between the United States, Israel, and Iran highlights the growing role of inexpensive drones. First-person-view (FPV) drones, originally for recreation, are now battlefield weapons. These agile drones offer precise strikes at a low cost, challenging expensive air defense systems. Their widespread use signals a shift in modern warfare tactics.

title: Middle East crisis: How will Americans pay for the Iran war as oil prices soar
content: Global oil markets are on edge as the Strait of Hormuz, a vital shipping lane, faces closure due to ongoing conflict. Analysts warn of soaring fuel prices, potentially reaching $150 a barrel, impacting transportation costs and leading to higher prices for consumers. This instability could also pressure the US economy, increasing inflation and recession risks.

title: Dubai travel disruptions: Air India cancels, IndiGo reschedules flights after UAE restricts ops
content: Air India and IndiGo are experiencing significant flight disruptions to the UAE, particularly Dubai, due to operational restrictions stemming from the West Asia crisis. Both airlines have cancelled multiple flights and are offering rebooking or refunds to affected passengers. These changes coincide with rising aviation fuel prices, leading airlines to implement fuel surcharges

title: 'India's DNA is to win trophies, Pakistan's is to lose': Rashid Latif's brutal attack
content: Former Pakistan captain Rashid Latif has sharply criticised the Pakistan Cricket Board following the team's T20 World Cup exit. He contrasted Pakistan's tendency to falter before knockouts with India's consistent success in major tournaments, attributing India's winning habit to years of hard work. Latif also labeled the PCB a 'weak board' over alleged contract mismanagement.

title: NFL Trade Rumors: Bo Nix’s Denver Broncos tied to $31M Washington Commanders WR
content: Deebo Samuel’s long-held desire to play for the Denver Broncos might finally materialize this season. The versatile wide receiver is known for his dual-threat abilities. He is seen as a perfect fit for Sean Payton’s scheme of playing. Despite injury concerns, Samuel’s potential impact on the gridiron, coupled with Denver’s need for offensive play, makes this an irresistible prospect for the franchise. Especially where Bo Nix’s style of playing is concerned. A running back and wideout in one player could benefit Nix.

title: Sidney Crosby injury update after Mitch Marner reveals Olympics setback
content: The Pittsburgh Penguins are still tracking the progress of captain Sidney Crosby, who sustained injuries at the 2026 winter Olympics. Recent news by Vegas Golden Knights forward Mitch Marner has given insight into the gravity of the problem. Marner reported that Crosby was sprained with Grade 2 of an MCL, which means that the Penguins awaited the return of the captain.

title: Fortnite Story Moment Power Hour event (March 14, 2026): Start timings for all regions
content: Fortnite's "Story Moment Power Hour" is scheduled for March 14, 2026, bridging the gap between Chapter 7 Season 1 and Season 2. This unrepeatable, live event will feature The Dark Voyager and provide crucial narrative context for the "Showdown." Players must log in precisely at their region's start time to participate.

title: Watch: Fire breaks out at Lanaz refinery in Iraq's Erbil after drone strike
content: A drone strike ignited a major fire at Erbil's Lanaz refinery in northern Iraq on Saturday, leading to a halt in operations. While officials confirmed the blaze was contained by Sunday, the facility remains shut as damage is assessed. This incident occurs amidst escalating security concerns tied to regional conflicts

title: Gujarat teen drugged, sexually assaulted and filmed on New Year’s trip to Mount Abu
content: A 17-year-old girl was allegedly drugged, sexually assaulted, and filmed at a Mount Abu New Year's party by a 14-year-old acquaintance and a 26-year-old man. The victim discovered the assault months later when a video of the incident went viral on social media. Police have arrested the man and are holding the minor.

title: Indian players were 'jealous' of Abhishek Sharma: Sanju Samson opens up
content: India's Sanju Samson lauded opening partner Abhishek Sharma, calling their partnership 'fire and fire' and a natural Kerala-Punjabi blend. Samson highlighted Abhishek's bravery and composure, enjoying their strong on and off-field camaraderie.  Their explosive partnership in the T20 World Cup final propelled India to a record third title win.

title: Gurgaon engineer stabs twin sister 50 times, calls mom to see ‘surprise’
content: An HPCL engineer allegedly murdered his twin sister in Moradabad, inflicting over 50 stab wounds in a brutal attack. The motive appears linked to a failed online relationship. The accused also attacked their mother, who survived the incident.

title: 'Arrived on 100 bikes': 150 attack 14 men from Kondhwa during Iftar near Askarwadi
content: A group of about 150 individuals is being sought by Saswad police. They are accused of attacking 14 men near a lake at Askarwadi. The victims were observing Ramzan Iftar when the assault occurred. The attackers reportedly used sticks, sharp weapons, and stones. The injured men received medical treatment. Police are reviewing CCTV footage to identify the suspects.

title: ‘Just for fun’: Trump signals fresh US strikes on Iran’s Kharg Island
content: US President Donald Trump indicated potential further strikes on Iran's Kharg Island oil export hub, stating previous actions "totally demolished" most of its oil infrastructure. While reporting strikes on military facilities, Trump warned energy infrastructure could be targeted if Iran disrupts shipping through the Strait of Hormuz.

title: Out of Tihar Jail, Sajjad Gul, Shabbir turn India’s ‘most-wanted’ LeT operatives again
content: Two Lashkar-e-Taiba terrorists, Sajjad and Shabbir Ahmed Lone, previously incarcerated in Delhi, have resurfaced as 'most wanted' operatives. Fleeing to Pakistan, Lone is now orchestrating terror plots from Bangladesh with ISI backing, while Sajjad leads the LeT proxy TRF from Rawalpindi. Both are considered extremely dangerous.

title: Rain lashes several parts of Delhi; temperature likely to drop to 27–29°C
content: Delhi experienced a welcome rainfall on Sunday morning, offering a break from the recent heat. Temperatures are expected to hover around 27-29°C, with a further chance of light rain and thunderstorms on March 18. While a temporary dip in maximum temperatures is anticipated, a gradual rise is forecast for the coming days, with night temperatures likely to remain mild.

title: ‘More than adequate stocks’: Govt assures no fertiliser shortage amid Middle East crisis
content: Amidst Middle East crisis concerns, India assures stable fertiliser supply for the upcoming Kharif season. Government data reveals urea stocks are higher than last year, with DAP and NPK reserves also significantly boosted. Domestic production is expected to exceed consumption, and global tenders have been issued to ensure uninterrupted shipments.

title: After Azad’s criticism, SKY, Gambhir visit temple with T20 WC - Watch
content: India's T20 World Cup champions visited a Mumbai temple, continuing celebrations despite a debate sparked by Kirti Azad's remarks questioning religious inclusivity. Azad argued the victory belonged to all Indians, not a specific faith. Harbhajan Singh and Gautam Gambhir defended the team's actions, emphasizing the magnitude of their achievement.

title: 'Ustaad Bhagat Singh' trailer: Pawan Kalyan returns as action cop
content: In the electrifying trailer for 'Ustaad Bhagat Singh', Pawan Kalyan steps back into the spotlight, portraying a formidable police officer. This film promises to be a rollercoaster of high-octane action, expertly mingling intense drama with vibrant romantic moments featuring Sreeleela and Raashii Khanna.

title: Probe Ordered After "Pandit" Option For Opportunists In UP Exam Stirs Row
content: In February, Netflix crime thriller 'Ghooskhor Pandat' stirred a row. Now, a "Pandit" option for a question on opportunists in a UP police recruitment examination has kicked up another storm.

title: "If He's Alive...": Iran Vows To "Pursue, Kill" Netanyahu Amid Death Rumours
content: Iran's remarks came amid social media posts raising questions about the whereabouts of Benjamin Netanyahu.

title: Election 2026 Date Announcement LIVE: Poll Dates For 5 States To Be Announced Today
content: The Election Commission will today announce dates for assembly polls in five states. Polls are due in West Bengal, Kerala, Tamil Nadu, Assam and Puducherry.

title: TVK Chief Appears Before CBI For 3rd Round Of Questioning In Karur Stampede
content: Tamilaga Vettri Kazhagam (TVK) Chief and actor Vijay appeared before the Central Bureau of Investigation (CBI) for the third round of questioning in connection with the Karur stampede in which 41 people were killed.

title: Loud Blasts In Dubai, Kuwait Airport Hit In Fresh Iranian Strikes
content: Loud sounds were heard in Dubai's Marina and Al Sufouh areas, while operations at UAE's Fujairah oil terminal came to a halt after Iranian strikes on Sunday.

title: 'Will Shoot You In Forehead': Lawrence Bishnoi Gang's Threat To Singer Badshah
content: In the post, Randeep Malik and Anil Pandit - both allegedly members of the Lawrence Bishnoi gang - also claimed responsibility for a recent firing incident outside an office in Panipat.

title: "Where's Bibi?" '6 Fingers' Video Sparks Concerns About Netanyahu
content: Social media posts raised questions about the whereabouts of Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu on Saturday as several users flagged concerns over his latest March 13 video which made it seem like he had six fingers in one of his hands.

title: "Died Doing What She Loved": Captain Among 6 US Soldiers Killed In Iraq Crash
content: While three were members of the US Air Force, the other three were stationed with the US Air National Guard.

title: NDTV Assam Conclave Live: Himanta Biswa Sarma To Address The Great Brahmaputra Dialogue
content: NDTV Assam Conclave Live: Assam Chief Minister Himanta Biswa Sarma, Union minister Sarbananda Sonowal and Rajya Sabha MP Sushmita Dev will be among the key leaders to speak at the event.

title: In Black Market, LPG Cylinder Selling For Rs 6,500, Refill For Rs 4,000
content: NDTV sting operations have exposed black marketers selling cylinders at steep prices - with rates going up to Rs 6,500 for a gas cylinder and Rs 3,500-Rs 4,000 to refill a 14-kg cylinder, which earlier cost Rs 900-Rs 1,000.

title: "I'd Do A Number": Trump's Warning To Hit Iran's Kharg Island, 38 Years Ago
content: Thirty-eight years before US forces targeted military targets on Iran's Kharg Island, he had said in an interview that he "would be harsh on Iran" and that "one bullet shot" on a US soldier or ship would invite an attack on the island

title: Is New Supreme Leader Mojtaba Khamenei "Disfigured" In Strikes? What Iran Said
content: Iran's foreign minister Abbas Araghchi on Saturday said that there was "no problem" with the Islamic Republic's new supreme leader, Mojtaba Khamenei, days after US President Donald Trump said he was "damaged" in the strikes.

title: Delhi-NCR Wake Up To Light Rain, Thunderstorms, More Showers Likely
content: Bringing relief from high temperatures uncharacteristic of early March, rain and winds brought relief to the citizens of Delhi and surrounding regions on Sunday morning.

title: US-Israel-Iran War: Iran's Foreign Minister Says 'No Problem' With Supreme Leader Mojtaba After Injury Reports
content: Iran's Army chief has issued a stern warning that the deaths of crew members from the IRIS Dena warship in the Indian Ocean "will not go unanswered", as reported by Al Jazeera, citing Iran's state news agency.

title: Netanyahu's Office Debunks Reports Of His Death, Says He's "Fine": Report
content: At the 0:35 mark, when Netanyahu raises his hands, extra flesh is seen next to the little finger, which many social media users claimed was the sixth finger, a 'Classic AI finger glitch'.

title: Queen Camilla Told Friend Harry Was "Brainwashed" By Meghan. He Responds
content: An author who has written a number of biographies about the royals wrote in a new book that Harry's elder brother William and his wife Kate were alarmed by Meghan's impact on him and regarded her as a threat.

title: "Thanked Great Friend PM Modi For Standing With Israel": Netanyahu To NDTV
content: Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu today told NDTV he spoke to his "great friend" Prime Minister Narendra Modi and thanked him for standing with Israel amid tensions in the Middle East.

title: Inside Man United's big decisions between now and next season, from manager to transfers
content: manchester united are in pole position to secure champions league qualification . united have climbed to third place in the premier league after 19 points from 24 . despite the upturn in fortunes since carrick's arrival, uncertainty remains over his future .

title: Can the Knicks get Towns, Brunson on track? Five issues they need to solve -- fast
content: the new york Knicks coach speaks of a standard, not unlike former Pittsburgh Steelers coach Mike Tomlin's . "the standard is the standard," he says in his news conferences . the coach was hired last July under the expectation that he would elevate the Knick to play until June .

title: Projecting all 30 MLB teams based on how busy -- or passive -- they were this winter
content: new york Yankees general manager says he's excited to run it back with those guys . "run it back" part of the discussion rankled many uneasy with the Yankees' late-starting offseason . what does it look like? Can it work? What does it work even mean in this regard?

title: Latest mini NFL mock draft: Yates projects picks 1-10 based on the free agency frenzy
content: trades, re-signings and big-name trades have affected how 2026 draft might unfold . some teams are slated to pick in the top 10 of April's first round . watch this as we start to get a clearer picture of what might happen on April 23 .

title: After storied career at Stanford, Jasmine Aikey is ready for NWSL debut
content: the youngest formula 1 driver to claim pole for a grand prix . the 19-year-old beats Sebastian Vettel's record from the 2008 italian Grand Prix . his move to the italian team is what prompted Mercedes to elevate Antonelli to F1 .

title: Passan's ultimate MLB season preview: Predictions, inside intel and breakout stars for all 30 teams
content: the 2026 season is less than two weeks away, with the new york Yankees visiting the San Francisco Giants in a March 25 season opener followed by a full schedule of opening day games the next day . here is a team-by-team look at the year ahead for all 30 MLB teams .

With an experience spanning more than two decades, he has reported extensively on migration, rural and tribal life, crime and the courts. He is passionate about data-driven journalism, particularly in analysing trends in the global diamond trade. Read More

title: Trinamool MP Mahua Moitra says BJP workers brought ‘jungle raj’ in West Bengal
content: Mahua Moitra criticised BJP workers for vandalising and attacking Bengal Minister Shashi Panja’s house, adding that no political party has ever vandalised the house of a Cabinet Minster in the State

title: G1 would have completed ribbon-cuttings: Congress's dig at ECI
content: The Congress frequently uses the term 'G2' to take swipes at Prime Minister Narendra Modi and Home Minister Amit Shah, who are both from Gujarat.

title: CM Adityanath tells recruitment boards to avoid making undignified remarks on any community
content: The controversy comes days after Opposition parties accused the BJP government in Uttar Pradesh of being "anti-Brahmin" following the alleged mistreatment of Swami Avimukteshwaranand Saraswati during the Magh Mela in Prayagraj.

title: Odisha BJP shifts its MLAs to Paradip ahead of Rajya Sabha polls
content: The BJP MLAs, including Ministers, boarded two luxury buses to the port town after a crucial meeting with senior party leaders at the BJP state party headquarters on Saturday (March 14, 2026).

title: In frames | War lights a kitchen fire
content: West Asian conflict has snuffed out a clean cooking fuel in kitchens; facing a crisis, homes and eateries are looking at firewood and biomass to energise their cooking

title: Watch: HPV vaccination roll out, climate change, metabolic diseases and more | Health Wrap
content: In this episode of Health Wrap, senior health journalists Ramya Kannan and Zubeda Hamid discuss the week’s important developments in public health. This episode looks at the rollout of Human papillomavirus (HPV) vaccination across States in India to prevent cervical cancer, which continues to claim thousands of lives each year.

title: ECI to announce Assembly poll dates for four States, one Union Territory today
content: The poll authority has convened a press conference at 4 p.m. to announce the schedule for Assam, Kerala, West Bengal, Tamil Nadu and the Union Territory of Puducherry

title: Fire breaks out at Nature Bazaar in south Delhi, around 50 shops gutted
content: According to the DFS, a call regarding the blaze was received at 7.37 a.m., following which 10 fire tenders were rushed to the spot to control the flames. No injury to anyone has been reported so far.

title: India well-placed to deal with any situation on crude oil, fuel amid West Asia supply shock: Piyush Goyal
content: Acknowledging that while the country is facing "stress" on the rupee, Mr. Goyal said there is no reason for anyone to panic as rupee is expected to bounce back in a more gradual fashion, possibly once the war is over

title: Fact check: Are “40 out of 100 children malnourished” in Gujarat?
content: Data indicates that the statement is true and that several of the worst affected districts are tribal ones, pointing to a higher burden of malnutrition among adivasi communities in the State

title: Gateway to the world, from Madurai
content: In the light of the Union government granting international airport status to the Madurai airport, S. Sundar traces the long history of such a demand and highlights what the new status will mean for the ever-growing tourism, connectivity, and industrial needs of districts in southern Tamil Nadu

title: Madhavaram Retteri lake set to have boating, tourism facilities in a few days
content: According to sources, two motorboats and floating jetties would be set up, and a cafeteria would be established in the island to attract visitors and also generate revenue through tickets and parking fee

title: BJP indulging in horse-trading to win Rajya Sabha election; former CM Naveen Patnaik
content: All political parties are conducting mock-poll training for their MLAs to ensure that their votes are not rejected

title: ‘Pandit’ option for question on opportunists trips up BJP in U.P. days after ‘anti-Brahmin’ claim by opposition
content: Uttar Pradesh BJP secretary Abhijat Mishra, who belongs to the Brahmin community, has written to Chief Minister Yogi Adityanath, raising objections to the question and seeking action against those responsible for setting the paper

title: Close fight on the cards in Kerala’s bellwether constituency — Ollur
content: Since 1982, Ollur has elected candidates from the front that eventually forms the government in the State. Urban-rural mix, strong religious influence, and shifting voter loyalties make the constituency politically complex

title: Jeweller arrested in IDFC First Bank fraud case in Haryana; 12th arrest
content: The case pertains to private lender IDFC First Bank, which had disclosed a ₹590 crore fraud involving certain employees and others at its Chandigarh branch in a set of accounts held by the Haryana government

title: Congress releases second list of 23 candidates for Assam polls
content: Congress general secretary (organisation) K.C. Venugopal released the second list of candidates for the 126-member Assembly; the party also left 15 seats for its alliance partners

title: Why did the SC allow passive euthanasia? | Explained
content: What test did the Supreme Court apply in the Harish Rana case to decide if continuing treatment was in his best interest? What nuanced distinction did it provide between active and passive euthanasia? What have been India’s past positions on the right to die?

title: Mojtaba Khamenei | The cleric with a gun
content: A wounded man who lost his parents and wife, and was elected the ‘Supreme Leader’ of a nation under attack from the world’s most powerful country and its closest ally, the ayatollah now faces a rare crisis his predecessors never confronted — to survive the storm and preserve the republic

title: Experts laud A.P. CM’s vision for Quantum Valley project
content: The project envisions the use of real, cutting-edge quantum science to position Andhra Pradesh as a global leader in the technology, they say

title: Amma canteens in Chennai see an increase in sales as LPG crisis forces hotels to shut
content: Corporation officials said adequate stocks of LPG cylinders will be made available for Amma Canteens to facilitate an increase in the quantity of food cooked

title: Corporation mulling community kitchens to ensure food: Mayor
content: He adds that the Corporation will intervene strongly to check hoarding and black marketeering of LPG cylinders; hotel owners directed not to fleece consumers in the name of LPG shortage

title: CMC organises competitions for school students to mark World Diabetes Day
content: CMC aims to highlight the importance of early detection, optimal glycemic control, lifestyle modification, and psychological well-being in preventing long-term neurological complications

title: Man held for possession of 300 kg gutka near Katpadi
content: Arsuram was coming from Bengaluru to deliver the consignment to traders in Vellore and adjoining towns

title: Deputy CM Udhayanidhi Stalin distributes welfare aid worth ₹100.49 crore in Tirupattur
content: After inaugurating 11 completed works worth ₹3.65 crore, Mr. Udhayanidhi says achieving zero percent in school dropout rates in the State is among the priorities of the Dravidian Model 2.0 government

title: CM Stalin writes to PM to increase rice procurement
content: In a letter to Mr. Modi, he said the timely opening of the Mettur Dam for irrigation, favourable climatic conditions, increased area coverage, improved crop management practices, better irrigation support, and the adoption of high-yielding varieties of paddy by farmers

title: International status for Madurai airport will draw more tourists, pilgrims, says Union Minister
content: Formally according the status to Madurai airport, Civil Aviation Minister Kinjarapu Rammohan Naidu says the move will also help create more jobs and greatly boost hospitality, MSME, and agricultural sectors in the district; he also inaugurates new air traffic control tower set up at cost of ₹94 crore

title: Varsity created needless controversy, says renowned feminist historian Uma Chakravarti
content: ‘The historical roots of patriarchy need to be understood. We need to study as well, because we have to substantiate our point of view. Changes have happened when we have understood changes,’ she said

title: Roadside eateries in Vijayawada worst hit by LPG crisis
content: Street vendors and owners of carts are struggling to keep their stalls running, while several others have either cut down their operations or closed temporarily

title: Erling Haaland is in a slump, and it has cost Man City the title
content: Erling Haaland has scored more goals against west Ham than any other side . the 25-year-old produced one of his worst and most frustrating performances of the season . arsenal had moved 10 points clear at the top of the table with a 2-0 win over Everton .

title: 'Hearing he’s not alive': Trump’s big claim on Mojtaba Khamenei amid US-Israel strikes on Iran
content: At TOI World Desk, our dedicated team of seasoned journalists and passionate writers tirelessly sifts through the vast tapestry of global events to bring you the latest news and diverse perspectives round the clock. With an unwavering commitment to accuracy, depth, and timeliness, we strive to keep you informed about the ever-evolving world, delivering a nuanced understanding of international affairs to our readers. Join us on a journey across continents as we unravel the stories that shape our interconnected world. Read More

title: Pakistani terrorist killed in joint Army–J&K police operation in Uri sector
content: The TOI News Desk comprises a dedicated and tireless team of journalists who operate around the clock to deliver the most current and comprehensive news and updates to the readers of The Times of India worldwide. With an unwavering commitment to excellence in journalism, our team is at the forefront of gathering, verifying, and presenting breaking news, in-depth analysis, and insightful reports on a wide range of topics. The TOI News Desk is your trusted source for staying informed and connected to the ever-evolving global landscape, ensuring that our readers are equipped with the latest developments that matter most." title: ‘Fake news’: Israel rejects rumours on Netanyahu's death after 'six fingers' video goes viral
content: At TOI World Desk, our dedicated team of seasoned journalists and passionate writers tirelessly sifts through the vast tapestry of global events to bring you the latest news and diverse perspectives round the clock. With an unwavering commitment to accuracy, depth, and timeliness, we strive to keep you informed about the ever-evolving world, delivering a nuanced understanding of international affairs to our readers. Join us on a journey across continents as we unravel the stories that shape our interconnected world. Read More

title: India at a crossroads, next step to define country’s future: Kamal Haasan
content: At the book launch of author and former West Bengal Governor Gopalkrishna Gandhi’s India and Her Futures, actor-MP Kamal Haasan said the question before our country is whether we join the chorus of nations exporting division as politics or remain true to the extraordinary, ethical, and moral imagination that created India

title: Transcultural exchanges have long shaped Kannada literature: Shivanand Kelaginamani
content: The professor says the long history of the Kannada language can be traced through classical works such as Kavirajamarga; he notes that elements from Sanskrit were gradually incorporated into Kannada.

title: India facilitating negotiations within BRICS on West Asia conflict: Jaiswal
content: Acknowledgement of intra-BRICS negotiation comes even as External Affairs Minister S. Jaishankar continues his telephone calls with his Iranian counterpart Seyed Abbas Araghchi and other regional diplomats

title: Why Indian airlines are among the worst hit by the Gulf conflict
content: Almost four crore people flew between India and the Gulf in 2025; half of all international passengers flying to or from India was on a Gulf route; idle aircraft, longer flights, higher costs, lower revenue all hurting Indian carriers

title: Kalaburagi Rangayana to organise month-long summer theatre workshop for children
content: Rangayana director Sujata Jangamshetty said the workshop aims to help children explore their creative abilities, understand theatre art and improve their personality development.

title: Ladakh to protest for safeguards on March 16, despite Sonam Wangchuk release
content: Struggle for rights continue, say civil society groups while demanding release of two more detained since September 2025; Opposition questions Centre over the prolonged detention of the activist and says PM should apologise to people of Ladakh

title: LPG crunch puts strain on mid-day meals for children at schools across India
content: Many schools are cutting down on their daily menu, affecting the nutritional quality of the food being provided to the children; reports indicate that as schools apply for gas cylinder refills, the situation may become dicey

title: Chief Minister M.K. Stalin meets Deva and Jiva, the child influencers who tell everyone to study
content: The brothers, natives of Sathipattu near Panruti in Cuddalore district, are known figures on social media through their reels over the last one-and-a-half years

title: Coffee-table book on wildlife of Tamil Nadu launched
content: The book, published jointly by The Hindu Group and the Department of Tourism, presents a visual and narrative journey through the State’s diverse natural landscapes, ecological systems, and cultural history

title: SC seeks status report on Ganga bank encroachments
content: Court asks Centre and National Mission for Ganga Authority to detail action on encroachments and floodplain demarcation along River Ganga

title: 23 students injured as goods train rams college bus in Karur
content: The accident occurred on a private railway line owned and operated by Chettinad Cement between Veerarakkiyam and Palayam

title: ‘Bengaluru’s wet waste has potential to meet 20% of gas consumed by restaurants’
content: The proposal was made by Som Narayan, co-founder and director of Carbon Masters, which operates a biomethanisation plant in Koramangala

title: Government bars PNG users from retaining or refilling LPG connections
content: Order aimed at protecting domestic LPG supply as West Asia tensions disrupt imports through Strait of Hormuz

title: Commercial LPG supplies in Telangana meeting only 20% demand; Uttam urges Centre for more commercial cylinders
content: Civil Supplies Minister writes to Centre requesting additional commercial LPG cylinders; appeals to people not to overbook domestic refills as contingency measures have been initiated

title: Seven-member SIT to investigate assassination attempt on Farooq Abdullah
content: The SIT has been formed after the former Jammu and Kashmir Chief Minister expressed concern over the security arrangements at the venue where attempt took place on March 11

title: As Samriddhi Yatra ends in Bihar, Nitish promises more development
content: Referring to the Opposition Rashtriya Janata Dal as ‘useless people’, the Bihar CM reiterates that he left the alliance with them following their wrongdoings within the government

title: Emotional farewell for KSCDC chairperson S. Jayamohan
content: The outgoing chairman leaves a decade-long tenure marked by a remarkable turnaround of the crisis-ridden PSU

title: Menstrual leave policy at national level keeping interest of women in mind would be welcome: Karnataka’s Labour Minister Santosh Lad
content: Karnataka has framed Karnataka Women Well Being Leave Bill, 2025, which is yet to be tabled in the Legislatur

title: Karnataka prisons to introduce drug tests for inmates to curb smuggling of narcotic substances
content: Under the initiative, inmates will be tested for substances such as ganja, heroin and cocaine. In the first phase, a group  of prisoners in all jails will undergo screening

title: Immensely pleased to celebrate JSP Formation Day in remote tribal area, says Pawan Kalyan
content: He unfurls the party flag in the presence of tribal communities at Onuru Junction and later walks  for about 2.4 km to inspect the road laid under the PM JANMAN scheme

title: Our emphasis is to promote raw talent, Union Sports Minister Mandaviya
content: The Union Minister says that the sports sector has opened up umpteen opportunities for youngsters to build their careers in the field.

title: Dirty water flows into Mahamagam Tank in Kumbakonam; officials swing into action
content: A clip showing black water flowing into the tank goes viral; MLA says stagnant water in Arasalaru flowed into the tank; civic officials spray disinfectants to make it safe

title: Steered by women and social media, Arabic calligraphy is witnessing a resurgence as an art form in south India
content: Arabic calligraphy witnesses a resurgence in South India. Nahla Nainar speaks to revivalists and students about Arabic and Urdu digital typing skills being promoted for a new generation.

title: Hotel industry in Kerala fears migrant exodus amid LPG crisis
content: ‘Migrants dominate the workforce in hotels as local residents are virtually absent from the industry. Shutting down hotels risks not only losing customers and revenue but also workers, who may choose to return home’

title: 460-km roads laid in tribal areas in last 18 months, says Deputy CM Pawan Kalyan
content: The coalition government in the State is a people-friendly administration that is committed to addressing public grievances, he says

title: Four sitting MPs’ keenness to contest Assembly polls puts Congress in a spot in Kerala
content: Party’s central leadership had repeatedly asked sitting MPs not to contest Assembly polls; unrest in party’s Pathanamthitta unit over alleged move to field candidates from even outside the district

title: Over 2.95 lakh cases settled in National Lok Adalat across Andhra Pradesh
content: Judicial officers order payment of ₹87.35 crore compensation as 400 Lok Adalat benches dispose of pending and pre-litigation cases across the State

title: Catering industry takes a hit amid LPG cylinder shortage
content: Caterers in Thiruvananthapuram stop taking fresh orders as cylinder shortage looms large; some switch to firewood, but point out its inconvenience

title: Hostels in Kerala stare at uncertainty amid LPG crisis
content: Hostels across the State, housing students and professionals, have started amending their usual menus, while a section has begun exploring the possibility of running community kitchens to tide over the looming crisis

title: A.P. govt. trying to underplay facts about State’s finances, alleges Buggana
content: The budget figures do not add up as there is a yawning gap between the allocations and the requirement to implement the promised schemes, says the former Finance Minister
